flavor: A hover-tram sighs past, its windows full of tired faces.
Steam vents from a grille, carrying the smell of someone's dinner.
Two Grid kids race drones overhead, laughing in a language you don't know.
A street preacher warns that Nexus City is dreaming, and you're all inside the dream.
Neon rain slicks the walkway; your reflection stretches long beneath you.
merchant: A traveling merchant has set up under an awning, wares glinting. (Another time.)
A hooded vendor waves you over to a cart of odd salvage. (Not today.)
trouble: Someone's being cornered in an alley. You could step in — or keep walking. (You walk on.)
A pickpocket's hand brushes your coat and thinks better of it.
sighting: You catch a glimpse of {name} across the way before the crowd swallows them.
{name} passes close enough to nod at you, already somewhere else in their head.
ad: An AR billboard blooms across your vision: "{slogan}," it says, warmly, in your mother's voice. {name} thanks you for your continued loyalty. You never signed anything.
A drone drifts past raining coupons. "{name} — {sector}." On its belly, someone has scratched WE ARE ALL PLANT 7.
A street screen crackles: {war} The crowd doesn't look up. The screen takes this personally and gets louder.
"{slogan}!" chirps a vending machine as you pass, then, quieter: "{name} values you specifically." It dispenses nothing. It just wanted you to know.
Two AR mascots are fistfighting over your head — this week's war, rendered adorable. Behind both of them, the same copyright line.
